seoTitle: Timbarra vs Timboon West — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Timbarra and Timboon West. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Timbarra vs Timboon West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Timbarra and Timboon West.
heading: Timbarra vs Timboon West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Timbarra, Victoria and Timboon West, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Timbarra has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Timboon West (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Timbarra or Timboon West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Timbarra has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Timboon West scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Timbarra scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Timboon West scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Timbarra or Timboon West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Timbarra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
